case_title: UGORJI OBINNA VS. LANIYA JAMES MASON

docket_entries.description: OBINNA (REMOVED 3/20/19), UGORJI IS NO LONGER PLAINTIFF THIS NAME ENTERED IN ERROR AS LAST NAME AND FIRST NAMES WERE REVERSED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 20, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UGORJI, OBINNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASON, LANIYA JAMES $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,135.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OBINNA  (REMOVED 3/20/19), UGORJI AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, LANIYA JAMES
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, LANIYA JAMES
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OBINNA  (REMOVED 3/20/19), UGORJI AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, LANIYA JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
